name: FAKO-M Getränke
message: FAKO-M GetränkeWe, the Fako-M Group, see ourselves as a partner to the hospitality industry, retail, and end consumers. In our delivery area of ​​North Rhine-Westphalia, we supply you with a comprehensive product range of over 7,000 items from the beverage, wine, spirits, coffee, and hygiene product categories. Our comprehensive offering is rounded out by services such as vending machine operation (cold and hot beverage, snack, and confectionery vending machines), event equipment, dispensing technology, financing advice, and leasing.Geo: Germany - Leak size: 446 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
